description: A passenger booked a flight but made a typo in their last name. They need to correct it to match their ID.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the booking and identify the name discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the booking and confirms the name needs correction.

nodes.task_description: Check the airline's policy and any applicable fees for minor name corrections.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds that minor corrections are allowed for a small fee.

nodes.task_description: Process the name correction, collect the fee, and reissue the ticket.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully corrects the name on the ticket and issues an updated confirmation.
